title: ReportBundle
description: Locally-saved evidence bundle produced by `REPORT_PEER` (peer-behavior) or by the AI-UGC report intake. Authored by docs/architecture/chat-safety.md § Report. v1 has no backend: bundles are written to the user's downloads folder via blob URL and never uploaded. `deviceCapture` is reserved-empty in v1; activating any field requires a privacy / retention policy update plus an explicit user-consent step.

v.description: Bundle version. Bumped only on a breaking shape change.

kind.description: Report category. `peer-behavior` is the default chat / lobby flow; `ai-ugc` routes to the AI-content intake (owned by the personal-data plan).

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp captured at click. Wall-clock; never enters deterministic state.

displayName.description: Reporter's display name at click. Optional; reporter may submit anonymously.
Subject's display name at click. Optional.

reasonCode.description: Closed reason set; locale-bound labels live in the network-lobby localization keys.

freeText.description: Optional reporter-supplied prose, NFKC-normalized and plain-text only.

chatExcerpt.description: Up to 50 messages from the subject (with a ±2-message context window around each subject message) preceding the report click. Reporter-only chatter outside that window is excluded to limit reporter self-incrimination data.

saveHash.description: Deterministic save-state hash at click. Lets a future backend correlate to a cheating claim.

deviceCapture.description: Reserved. v1 emits an empty object. No IP, no UA, no fingerprint until a backend exists and the privacy / retention plan adds an explicit user-consent step.
